title: Marketplace Manager - Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Gurgaon operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates:
Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal Asia Pacific Associates!
